case_title: UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC VS. CHEN CHU ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE THREE DY NOTICE OF PAY RENT OR QUIT AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER-CODE CIVIL PROC., 585(D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $167.34 FILED BY PLAINTIFF UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHU, CHEN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 388 BEALE STREET #808, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105 , SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, CHEN
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, CHEN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $695.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, CHEN
DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL LEASE AGREEMENT, NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, CHEN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC SERVED MAY-20-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, CHEN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC SERVED MAY-20-2017, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, CHEN DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHU, CHEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER A-ISSUE. $3,018.00 RENT, $490.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $695.00 COSTS, $11,044.44 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,247.44, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
